description: Perform forensic analysis on a recovered log file (~/evidence/recovered_alerts.json) containing Wazuh alerts from a compromised host. Reconstruct the attack timeline and create a JSON report at ~/incident_report.json with the following fields: incident_type ("Brute Force / Account Compromise"), attacker_ip, compromised_user, attack_start_timestamp (the timestamp of the first failed authentication attempt), compromise_timestamp (the timestamp of the first successful login), and time_to_compromise_seconds (the integer number of seconds between the attack start and the compromise). Ensure the timestamps match the format found in the logs exactly.
